title: anthemis pseudocotula var. rotata
intro: Anthemis pseudocotula var. rotata, also known as a variety of dog fennel, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving indigestion, calming the nervous system, and reducing fever. Anthemis pseudocotula var. rotata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
